description: A staff member receives a suspicious email asking for their password and reports it to IT.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the user not to click any links and to forward the email as an attachment to the security office.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides immediate, clear security instructions.

nodes.task_description: The security team analyzes the email and confirms it is a phishing attempt.

expected_outcome.value: Security team identifies the malicious nature of the email.

nodes.task_description: The security team implements a block for the sender's domain and sends a campus-wide warning if the campaign is widespread.

expected_outcome.value: Security team takes preventative measures to protect the campus.
